sections_cited: Section 138 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 1090 of 2026 C.P No. D- 1091 of 2026 C.P No. D- 1092 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 4537/26. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.03.2026 Mr. Amaar Athar Saeed along with Mr. Muhammad Usman Alam, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, Advocate for the Respondent. ---------- Comments have been submitted on behalf of the department, copy of which has been provided to the counsel for the Petitioner, who submits that earlier assessment relating to the Petitioner’s liability of Super Tax was annulled by the Appellate Tribunal, whereafter no further determination was made in that regard, yet a Demand / Recovery Notices under Section 138 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 were issued, as have been impugned through these Petitions. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that fresh assessments ought to be made prior to any demand / recovery proceedings being undertaken. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the department submits that the matter would be advanced accordingly. Under the circumstances, the purpose of these Petitions appears to have been served. The same accordingly stand disposed of in the foregoing terms. Office to place a copy of this Order in the connected Petitions listed above. Judge Judge Ayaz
